item: Mobily = #2 Saudi telecom (Etihad Etisalat), 14.4M subscribers, FY2025 SAR 19.6B revenue (+7.9%, strongest in 12 years), Ever Closer 2030 AI strategy, ICT partner for NEOM/Qiddiya. Thamer Albeteri likely GM Digital Services (CONFIRM remit). Channel thesis: distribution at zero CAC + ARPU lift + Vision-2030 sovereign-AI halo.
